title: Integrate Stripe payment processing

requirements.text: Add Stripe payment processing integration to replace the current payment methods (Cash on Delivery and UPI). The payment flow should automatically confirm orders upon successful payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Stripe payment option is available on the payment page
Users can complete payment through Stripe's secure checkout
Orders are automatically confirmed after successful Stripe payment
Payment confirmation updates the order status in the backend

requirements.text: Update the PaymentPage.tsx to include Stripe as a payment method option alongside or replacing existing payment methods.

quotes: make the payment page well where I can connect my bank

acceptanceCriteria: Payment page displays Stripe payment option
UI clearly indicates secure payment processing

requirements.text: Implement backend logic to handle Stripe payment webhooks and automatically confirm orders when payment is successful.

quotes: when the customer have paid for the order my bank will detect it automatically and then you conform the order

acceptanceCriteria: Backend receives and validates Stripe webhook events
Order status is updated to confirmed upon successful payment
Failed payments do not confirm orders

constraints: Must use Stripe for payment processing (external bank integration is not supported)
Preserve existing product management and cart functionality
Do not modify Internet Identity authentication hooks
nonGoals: Real-time bank transaction monitoring outside of Stripe
